title: FunctionReference - Metadata API
description: Represents information about a deployed Salesforce Function that can be invoked from the org. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

description.description: Represents the description of the Salesforce Function.

label.description: Represents the label for the Salesforce Function.

permissionSet.description: Represents a set of permissions that's used to control org resources that the Function has access to.
